### La Nuit des Cordes 2016

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2016/la-nuit-des-cordes-2016/

Fact — 27 Feb · Montreal, Canada 🇨🇦 · Espace des Arts · Past

Fact — La Nuit des Cordes 2016 runs 27 Feb in Montreal, Canada.

Fact — Montreal annual rope-bondage performance event established by Ebi McKnotty and Dunter in 2014, inspired by Morpheous' Bondage Extravaganza and tied to Nuit Blanche / Montréal en Lumière. The official current site says NDC has been part of Nuit Blanche every year since, with the 2021 edition virtual and a 2024 return in person at the usual Espace des Arts. Public listings and archives place the 2015, 2016, 2017 and 2019 editions at Espace des Arts / 9 Sainte-Catherine Est; the 2021 page frames the event as a seven-hour digital edition with 100+ artists, simultaneous performances, circus, erotic bondage, acrobatic and decorative rope, and photography exhibition context.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Nuit blanche activity roundup

- 19:00-03:00 La nuit des cordes at Espaces des Arts, with about 80 rope / bondage artisans and around 100 direct performances
  - Linked evidence or record: [La nuit des cordes](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/events/la-nuit-des-cordes/)

### MoscowKnot 2016

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2016/moscowknot-2016/

Fact — 22–24 Apr · Moscow, Russia 🇷🇺 · Past

Fact — MoscowKnot 2016 runs 22–24 Apr in Moscow, Russia.

Transmission — Moscow shibari / bondage festival lineage associated with Vlada Vedmovskaya's Russian-scene organizing work. Public traces use the Moscow Knot name for bondage-festival performances by 2015 / 2016, such as Andrea Ropes and Xa Na, while BalkanBound's history frames MoscowKnot International as the 2018-present international event that connected practitioners and audiences and popularized shibari in Russia and abroad. RopeMarks' own archive records a 2018 Moscow Knot edition at Mona Club with RopeMarks shows, a RopeMarks Ryu workshop and Yagami Ren in the same program, plus an October 2018 follow-up RopeMarks Ryu weekend at Club Predel organized by Vlada and Falco. Ka.sure characterizes Vlada as one of the founders and producers of Moscow Knot for many years. This entry keeps the early Moscow Knot performance traces and the later International format together because they belong to the same 2010s Moscow event lineage rather than separate visual eras.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Andrea Ropes event-list trace

- Andrea Ropes show and workshop with Clementine Poulain
  - Linked evidence or record: [Andrea Ropes](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/andrea-ropes/)

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2016/prague-shibari-festival-2016/

Fact — 28–30 Oct · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · Prague Karlin · Past

Fact — Prague Shibari Festival 2016 runs 28–30 Oct in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — 2010s slice of Prague Shibari Festival, a three-day rope event held twice a year in Prague since 2016. The first 2016 Prague Karlin edition combined English / Czech workshop tracks with Friday and Saturday performance nights; later 2017-2019 archives keep the pre-pandemic festival circuit visible. This founding-era entry keeps Soptik's Prague organization, Subspace pre-party / local scene context and source-supported early international presenters such as Caritia, Felix Ruckert, Hedwig, Pedro Cordas, Thure Nyyrikki, Miss Eris, RopeMarks, Tamandua, Gestalta, Asiana and Michael RopeKnight attached to the founding decade.

### RopeFest Estonia 2016

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2016/ropefest-estonia-2016/

Fact — 16 Jul · Tallinn, Estonia 🇪🇪 · Past

Fact — RopeFest Estonia 2016 runs 16 Jul in Tallinn, Estonia.

Fact — 2010s slice of Russia's first and largest shibari festival, first held in Saint Petersburg in 2012 and developed via the ArtCo / RopeSchool ecosystem before the pandemic-era break. ShibariNews characterizes Rope Fest as the first Russian Shibari Festival in St Petersburg, supported by Shibari Club Yugen, RopeSchool, RopeShop.Guru and KinkAfisha, with multi-day performances, seminars, peer rope, escape events and rope jams. The 2010s branch locations the early Saint Petersburg / Moscow / Baltia festival family and its international guest-master roster.

### Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2016

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2016/seattle-erotic-art-festival-2016/

Fact — 22–24 Apr · Seattle, United reports 🇺🇸 · Seattle Center Exhibition Hall · Past

Fact — Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2016 runs 22–24 Apr in Seattle, United reports.

Fact — Long-running Seattle erotic-art and performance festival with a durable rope-relevant scene connection. The official history page says the first Seattle Erotic Art Festival was produced in 2003 by the Pan Eros Foundation, grew into a multi-format festival spanning visual art, performance, literature and film, and introduced an Aerial Stage for aerialists and rope performances in 2018. The official photo archive preserves dated 2011-2021 festival venue traces, while the current home page advertises the 2026 edition at Seattle Center Exhibition Hall.

Fact — Shi Fest Ukraine 2016 runs 26–27 Aug in Kyiv, Ukraine.

Fact — Kyiv international shibari festival organized in the Ukrainian Soul Shibari / Tati Limati orbit. Soul Shibari records dated editions on November 14, 2015; August 26-27, 2016; August 26, 2018; and September 7-8, 2019, with the 2019 page framing that edition as the 4th international Shibari Festival and naming Tati Limati as the main organizer.

### Bound In Boston XX 2017

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2017/bound-in-boston-xx-2017/

Fact — 24–26 Mar · Warwick, RI, United reports 🇺🇸 · Crowne Plaza Hotel · Past

Fact — Bound In Boston XX runs 24–26 Mar in Warwick, RI, United reports.

Fact — New England / Boston-area rope-bondage convention and workshop series centered on Shibari / Kinbaku-style rope education. Official archived pages document Bound In Boston XIII for March 23-24, 2013, Sched records Bound In Boston XX for March 24-26, 2017 at Crowne Plaza Hotel, Warwick, RI, and later official pages describe the March 16-18, 2018 Warwick edition as a large-format con with hundreds of people, classes and parties. Matthew / RopeRider's 2018 farewell says the series grew from a January 2009 30-person Sunday education session into 21 cons over nine years at four hotels, with Tethered Together emerging from the same organizer / staff continuity after the final Bound In Boston.

Fact — 17–19 Nov · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · Past

Fact — Prague Shibari Festival 2017 runs 17–19 Nov in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — 2010s slice of Prague Shibari Festival, a three-day rope event held twice a year in Prague since 2016. The first 2016 Prague Karlin edition combined English / Czech workshop tracks with Friday and Saturday performance nights; later 2017-2019 archives keep the pre-pandemic festival circuit visible. This founding-era entry keeps Soptik's Prague organization, Subspace pre-party / local scene context and source-supported early international presenters such as Caritia, Felix Ruckert, Hedwig, Pedro Cordas, Thure Nyyrikki, Miss Eris, RopeMarks, Tamandua, Gestalta, Asiana and Michael RopeKnight attached to the founding decade.

### Rome Bondage Week 2017

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2017/rome-bondage-week-2017/

Fact — 13–17 Sep · Rome, Italy 🇮🇹 · Lost and Found Studio / Qube · Past

Fact — Rome Bondage Week 2017 runs 13–17 Sep in Rome, Italy.

Fact — Italian bondage festival / event series in Rome. Public 2017-2021 event pages describe Rome Bondage Week as a festival dedicated to the art of bondage, exploring Japanese tradition and contemporary Western experimentations via workshops, performances, peer-rope and cultural events, with production by Ritual The Club / Ritual LAB. Dated public traces place the 2017 edition at Lost and Found Studio / Qube, the 2018 edition at Largo Venue, and the 2019-2021 listings around Via del Mandrione / Snodo Mandrione. Red Lily's public events page still characterizes her as artistic director of Rome Bondage Week, giving a durable existing-entry connection into the event shell.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

- Five-day Rome Bondage Week at Lost and Found Studio / Qube with 60 hours of programming, workshops, masterclasses, performances, peer rope and 28 international artists

Fact — 26–29 May · Chicago, IL, United reports 🇺🇸 · Past

Fact — ROPECRAFT Chicago 2017 runs 26–29 May in Chicago, IL, United reports.

Fact — US rope-focused kink convention with events in Austin, New Orleans, San Antonio, and Chicago. The official about page frames the event as Graydancer frames: ROPECRAFT and records the 2016 Austin / NOLA origins before later Chicago, San Antonio and online editions. Combines shibari, western bondage, power exchange, solo tying, wellness, play, presenters, performances, vendors, parties, and peer-learning formats such as Ropenspace.

### Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2017

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2017/seattle-erotic-art-festival-2017/

Fact — 27–30 Apr · Seattle, United reports 🇺🇸 · Seattle Center Exhibition Hall · Past

Fact — Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2017 runs 27–30 Apr in Seattle, United reports.

Fact — Long-running Seattle erotic-art and performance festival with a durable rope-relevant scene connection. The official history page says the first Seattle Erotic Art Festival was produced in 2003 by the Pan Eros Foundation, grew into a multi-format festival spanning visual art, performance, literature and film, and introduced an Aerial Stage for aerialists and rope performances in 2018. The official photo archive preserves dated 2011-2021 festival venue traces, while the current home page advertises the 2026 edition at Seattle Center Exhibition Hall.

### Bound In Boston 2018

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2018/bound-in-boston-final-2018/

Fact — 16–18 Mar · Warwick, RI, United reports 🇺🇸 · Past

Fact — Bound In Boston 2018 runs 16–18 Mar in Warwick, RI, United reports.

Fact — New England / Boston-area rope-bondage convention and workshop series centered on Shibari / Kinbaku-style rope education. Official archived pages document Bound In Boston XIII for March 23-24, 2013, Sched records Bound In Boston XX for March 24-26, 2017 at Crowne Plaza Hotel, Warwick, RI, and later official pages describe the March 16-18, 2018 Warwick edition as a large-format con with hundreds of people, classes and parties. Matthew / RopeRider's 2018 farewell says the series grew from a January 2009 30-person Sunday education session into 21 cons over nine years at four hotels, with Tethered Together emerging from the same organizer / staff continuity after the final Bound In Boston.

#### Programme

BoundCon combines trade fair, stage shows, rope space, workshops, custom photo shoots and international bondage artists. Fact — EURIX XII / Spring 2018 runs 12–17 Mar in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — European Rigger & Model Exchange — Berlin's bi-annual gathering for international rope artists, established by Felix Ruckert in 2012. This entry represents the 2010s phase, from the schwelle7 editions via the pre-pandemic Berlin exchange years. A primary diffusion vector of contemporary shibari pedagogy spanning Europe; Andrea Ropes' own event list includes EURIX Berlin in September 2016.

### Jyo-mon 2018

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2018/jyo-mon-2018/

Fact — 4 Feb · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · Theater Poo, Shinjuku · Past

Fact — Jyo-mon runs 4 Feb in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Tokyo shibari performance event associated with Hajime Kinoko and Ichinawakai. A 2018 Tokyo Shibari Aid report characterizes Jyo-mon as a Shinjuku shibari night hosted by Hajime Kinoko, structured as both an Ichinawakai student showcase and a mature performance night with established masters such as Nawashi Kanna, Shishi-waka, Shinobu Fuwa and Maruku. Tokyo Love District's 2025 listing frames Jyo-mon as a three-day Takadanobaba rope-performance event with Grace / Harmony / Beauty themes and a roster naming Hajime Kinoko, ZIMA & Mafuyu, Jake & Laced, VESPER & Miho, KungFurious and Louis Kordex. Louis Kordexe's official 2026 event page confirms continuing Takadanobaba / Studio Kicolit continuity under Hajime Kinoko, documenting a Sunday May 24, 2026 performance pair with Kiyome inside a three-day edition.

### Onawa Asobi 2018

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2018/onawa-asobi-tokyo-2018/

Fact — 17–18 Nov · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · Studio KCL Tokyo · Past

Fact — Onawa Asobi 2018 runs 17–18 Nov in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Tokyo-centered annual female bakushi festival / high-skilled amateur and professional kinbaku stage established and produced by Yoi Yoshida since 2009. Kinbaku Today's Yoi interview says the first June 2009 Onawa Asobi grew from the Good-Studio orbit and featured Hajime Kinoko, Kasumi Hourai, Shigonawa Bingo, Ero Ouji and others; later interview traces place Ranki Kazami at Onawa Asobi 2010, while Shibari Lounge sources document BeShibari and Shibarista Jess performing at Tokyo Onawa Asobi in 2019. The European edition (Onawa Asobi Europe) was launched from this Tokyo format as a partnership with Shibari Lounge.

Fact — Rope Spirit VIII runs 9 Jun in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — Prague / Czech shibari performance event produced in the Hell Events orbit. Rope Spirit frames nights of Japanese bondage / shibari performances with a strict no-photo policy and post-show tying floor, and Sanctuary's 2026 listing characterizes the twentieth Rope Spirit as having grown from a small first meeting roughly eleven years earlier into a larger but still intimate show format. Archived performer and live gallery traces preserve continuity from the 2015 first editions via Rope Spirit XX in 2026, such as Frater & Manako at Rope Spirit VI and Nawasabi with Schwarzes Biest at Rope Spirit IX.

Fact — 2010s slice of Russia's first and largest shibari festival, first held in Saint Petersburg in 2012 and developed via the ArtCo / RopeSchool ecosystem before the pandemic-era break. ShibariNews characterizes Rope Fest as the first Russian Shibari Festival in St Petersburg, supported by Shibari Club Yugen, RopeSchool, RopeShop.Guru and KinkAfisha, with multi-day performances, seminars, peer rope, escape events and rope jams. The 2010s branch locations the early Saint Petersburg / Moscow / Baltia festival family and its international guest-master roster.

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/eurix-xiv-2019/

Fact — 15–20 Apr · Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 · Holzmarkt / Saelchen · Past

Fact — EURIX XIV / Spring 2019 runs 15–20 Apr in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — European Rigger & Model Exchange — Berlin's bi-annual gathering for international rope artists, established by Felix Ruckert in 2012. This entry represents the 2010s phase, from the schwelle7 editions via the pre-pandemic Berlin exchange years. A primary diffusion vector of contemporary shibari pedagogy spanning Europe; Andrea Ropes' own event list includes EURIX Berlin in September 2016.

### La Nuit des Cordes 2019

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/la-nuit-des-cordes-2019/

Fact — 2 Mar · Montreal, Canada 🇨🇦 · Espace des Arts · Past

Fact — La Nuit des Cordes 2019 runs 2 Mar in Montreal, Canada.

Fact — Montreal annual rope-bondage performance event established by Ebi McKnotty and Dunter in 2014, inspired by Morpheous' Bondage Extravaganza and tied to Nuit Blanche / Montréal en Lumière. The official current site says NDC has been part of Nuit Blanche every year since, with the 2021 edition virtual and a 2024 return in person at the usual Espace des Arts. Public listings and archives place the 2015, 2016, 2017 and 2019 editions at Espace des Arts / 9 Sainte-Catherine Est; the 2021 page frames the event as a seven-hour digital edition with 100+ artists, simultaneous performances, circus, erotic bondage, acrobatic and decorative rope, and photography exhibition context.

### Onawa Asobi 2019 Vol. 12

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/onawa-asobi-tokyo-2019/

Fact — 9–10 Nov · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · Studio KCL Tokyo · Past

Fact — Onawa Asobi 2019 Vol. 12 runs 9–10 Nov in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Tokyo-centered annual female bakushi festival / high-skilled amateur and professional kinbaku stage established and produced by Yoi Yoshida since 2009. Kinbaku Today's Yoi interview says the first June 2009 Onawa Asobi grew from the Good-Studio orbit and featured Hajime Kinoko, Kasumi Hourai, Shigonawa Bingo, Ero Ouji and others; later interview traces place Ranki Kazami at Onawa Asobi 2010, while Shibari Lounge sources document BeShibari and Shibarista Jess performing at Tokyo Onawa Asobi in 2019. The European edition (Onawa Asobi Europe) was launched from this Tokyo format as a partnership with Shibari Lounge.

Fact — 4–6 Oct · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · Past

Fact — Prague Shibari Festival 2019 runs 4–6 Oct in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — 2010s slice of Prague Shibari Festival, a three-day rope event held twice a year in Prague since 2016. The first 2016 Prague Karlin edition combined English / Czech workshop tracks with Friday and Saturday performance nights; later 2017-2019 archives keep the pre-pandemic festival circuit visible. This founding-era entry keeps Soptik's Prague organization, Subspace pre-party / local scene context and source-supported early international presenters such as Caritia, Felix Ruckert, Hedwig, Pedro Cordas, Thure Nyyrikki, Miss Eris, RopeMarks, Tamandua, Gestalta, Asiana and Michael RopeKnight attached to the founding decade.

### Rome Bondage Week @ Nacosetta Estiva 2019

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/rome-bondage-week-2019/

Fact — 27–29 Sep · Rome, Italy 🇮🇹 · Na Cosetta Estiva · Past

Fact — Rome Bondage Week @ Nacosetta Estiva runs 27–29 Sep in Rome, Italy.

Fact — Italian bondage festival / event series in Rome. Public 2017-2021 event pages describe Rome Bondage Week as a festival dedicated to the art of bondage, exploring Japanese tradition and contemporary Western experimentations via workshops, performances, peer-rope and cultural events, with production by Ritual The Club / Ritual LAB. Dated public traces place the 2017 edition at Lost and Found Studio / Qube, the 2018 edition at Largo Venue, and the 2019-2021 listings around Via del Mandrione / Snodo Mandrione. Red Lily's public events page still characterizes her as artistic director of Rome Bondage Week, giving a durable existing-entry connection into the event shell.

### Rope Spirit IX 2019

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/rope-spirit-ix-2019/

Fact — 19 Jan · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · P.M. Club & Cocktail bar · Past

Fact — Rope Spirit IX runs 19 Jan in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — Prague / Czech shibari performance event produced in the Hell Events orbit. Rope Spirit frames nights of Japanese bondage / shibari performances with a strict no-photo policy and post-show tying floor, and Sanctuary's 2026 listing characterizes the twentieth Rope Spirit as having grown from a small first meeting roughly eleven years earlier into a larger but still intimate show format. Archived performer and live gallery traces preserve continuity from the 2015 first editions via Rope Spirit XX in 2026, such as Frater & Manako at Rope Spirit VI and Nawasabi with Schwarzes Biest at Rope Spirit IX.

The official about page frames the event as Graydancer frames: ROPECRAFT and records the 2016 Austin / NOLA origins before later Chicago, San Antonio and online editions. ### RopeFest Moscow 2019

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/ropefest-moscow-2019/

Fact — 3–4 Nov · Moscow, Russia 🇷🇺 · Past

Fact — RopeFest Moscow 2019 runs 3–4 Nov in Moscow, Russia.

Fact — 2010s slice of Russia's first and largest shibari festival, first held in Saint Petersburg in 2012 and developed via the ArtCo / RopeSchool ecosystem before the pandemic-era break. ShibariNews characterizes Rope Fest as the first Russian Shibari Festival in St Petersburg, supported by Shibari Club Yugen, RopeSchool, RopeShop.Guru and KinkAfisha, with multi-day performances, seminars, peer rope, escape events and rope jams. The 2010s branch locations the early Saint Petersburg / Moscow / Baltia festival family and its international guest-master roster.

Fact — Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2019 runs 25–28 Apr in Seattle, United reports.

Fact — Long-running Seattle erotic-art and performance festival with a durable rope-relevant scene connection. The official history page says the first Seattle Erotic Art Festival was produced in 2003 by the Pan Eros Foundation, grew into a multi-format festival spanning visual art, performance, literature and film, and introduced an Aerial Stage for aerialists and rope performances in 2018. The official photo archive preserves dated 2011-2021 festival venue traces, while the current home page advertises the 2026 edition at Seattle Center Exhibition Hall.

### Shibaricamp 2019

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2019/shibaricamp-sweden-2019/

Fact — 5–11 Aug · Smogen, Sweden 🇸🇪 · Bohuslan / Smogen area · Past

Fact — Shibaricamp 2019 runs 5–11 Aug in Smogen, Sweden.

Fact — Recurring week-long summer camp on the west coast of Sweden focused on rope bondage, community, co-creation, classes, private tuition, rope play and small-group learning. Held in Bohuslan near Gothenburg / Smogen; the 2019 edition ran August 5-11 and listed a complete teacher team such as Sansblague & Bergborg, Lello Li & Alex Mino, Andrea Ropes & Chiara Fenice, MnR and Artifexual. The 2025 edition ran August 4-10 and listed Stuart, Luke & Kate, Rope and Yukiscream / Miya in its public teacher traces. The 2026 edition runs August 3-9 and the official teachers page names Annika, Isla & Luisa, Neya & Kameko, and Tiferet & Lily. Shibaricamp's own teacher archive also records a dense international 2010s / 2020s roster such as Anna Bones & Fred Hatt, Barkas & Addie, Sansblague & Bergborg, Ceci Ferox, Gestalta, Soptik, Tifereth, Joan von Brook, Petite Pretzel and Andrea Ropes.

### Onawa Asobi Europe 2020

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2020/onawa-asobi-europe-2020/

Fact — 22–23 Feb · Antwerp, Belgium 🇧🇪 · Shibari Lounge · Past

Fact — Onawa Asobi Europe 2020 runs 22–23 Feb in Antwerp, Belgium.

Fact — European edition of the Tokyo-centered Onawa Asobi kinbaku festival, held at Shibari Lounge in Antwerp. The Tokyo festival has run yearly since 2009 under Yoi Yoshida and is described by Onawa Europe as a stepping stone for many Japanese shibarite, such as Naka Akira, Hajime Kinoko, Ranki Kazami, Ren Yagami, Kasumi Hourai, Shigonawa Bingo and Ero Ouji. Yoi Yoshida teamed with BeShibari / Marc BeShibari and Shibarista Jess to bring the format to Antwerp in 2020; later European editions followed in 2023, 2024, 2025 and 2026. The event frames itself as two days of amateur Japanese and European kinbaku performances, Shibari Night rope parties, friendship, cultural exchange and sincere rope interaction rather than a competition or masterclass convention.

Public 2017-2021 event pages describe Rome Bondage Week as a festival dedicated to the art of bondage, exploring Japanese tradition and contemporary Western experimentations via workshops, performances, peer-rope and cultural events, with production by Ritual The Club / Ritual LAB. Dated public traces place the 2017 edition at Lost and Found Studio / Qube, the 2018 edition at Largo Venue, and the 2019-2021 listings around Via del Mandrione / Snodo Mandrione. Red Lily's public events page still characterizes her as artistic director of Rome Bondage Week, giving a durable existing-entry connection into the event shell.

Fact — La Nuit des Cordes 2021 runs 13 Mar in Montreal, Canada as a fully online event.

Fact — Montreal annual rope-bondage performance event established by Ebi McKnotty and Dunter in 2014, inspired by Morpheous' Bondage Extravaganza and tied to Nuit Blanche / Montréal en Lumière. The official current site says NDC has been part of Nuit Blanche every year since, with the 2021 edition virtual and a 2024 return in person at the usual Espace des Arts. Public listings and archives place the 2015, 2016, 2017 and 2019 editions at Espace des Arts / 9 Sainte-Catherine Est; the 2021 page frames the event as a seven-hour digital edition with 100+ artists, simultaneous performances, circus, erotic bondage, acrobatic and decorative rope, and photography exhibition context.

Fact — Seattle Erotic Art Festival 2021 runs 29–31 Oct in Seattle, United reports.

Fact — Long-running Seattle erotic-art and performance festival with a durable rope-relevant scene connection. The official history page says the first Seattle Erotic Art Festival was produced in 2003 by the Pan Eros Foundation, grew into a multi-format festival spanning visual art, performance, literature and film, and introduced an Aerial Stage for aerialists and rope performances in 2018. The official photo archive preserves dated 2011-2021 festival venue traces, while the current home page advertises the 2026 edition at Seattle Center Exhibition Hall.

### Shibaricamp 2021

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2021/shibaricamp-2021/

Fact — 9–15 Aug · Bohuslan / Gothenburg area, Sweden 🇸🇪 · Past

Fact — Shibaricamp 2021 runs 9–15 Aug in Bohuslan / Gothenburg area, Sweden.

Fact — Recurring week-long summer camp on the west coast of Sweden focused on rope bondage, community, co-creation, classes, private tuition, rope play and small-group learning. Held in Bohuslan near Gothenburg / Smogen; the 2019 edition ran August 5-11 and listed a complete teacher team such as Sansblague & Bergborg, Lello Li & Alex Mino, Andrea Ropes & Chiara Fenice, MnR and Artifexual. The 2025 edition ran August 4-10 and listed Stuart, Luke & Kate, Rope and Yukiscream / Miya in its public teacher traces. The 2026 edition runs August 3-9 and the official teachers page names Annika, Isla & Luisa, Neya & Kameko, and Tiferet & Lily. Shibaricamp's own teacher archive also records a dense international 2010s / 2020s roster such as Anna Bones & Fred Hatt, Barkas & Addie, Sansblague & Bergborg, Ceci Ferox, Gestalta, Soptik, Tifereth, Joan von Brook, Petite Pretzel and Andrea Ropes.

Bonobo, Resident Advisor and WOMB listings show continued 2024-2025 editions combining shibari, philosophy, electronic music, visual art and performance, such as WOMB 2025 traces for Hajime Kinoko, Hidden Layer Show and LaoDai.

Fact — Australian Kinbaku Dreams rope camp / performance-team and event umbrella hosted via Kinbaku Australia. The current official site frames Kinbaku Dreams around immersive gatherings, evocative performances and inclusive workshops, and the Humanitix collection characterizes it as a performance team coordinating rope-related events via the year. Public Jungle Love coverage places Kinbaku Dreams in the 2018 performance-art lineup beside a Shibari workshop, while Humanitix records the September 2022 Jungle Love theme camp as an expansion of an earlier popular workshop into performances, intro and beginner workshops, rope experiences and intermediate / advanced workshops. The 2024 Partici-party page records Kinbaku Dreams as a returning Jungle Love feature theme camp, and later Humanitix pages track the shift into capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreats and camps in 2025-2027.

Fact — RopeFest Moscow 2023 runs 4–5 Nov in Moscow, Russia.

Fact — 2020s slice of the RopeFest event family, now covering current Moscow / RFMSK23 traces, a 2022 Saint Petersburg / Skorokhod photo-archive trace and the revived RopeFest Peterburg 2026 branch. The official Moscow site frames the 2023 edition as an international shibari festival and records current Moscow-scene participants and teachers such as Nick Freerider, Zevsa and Poryadnov, while Kommersant Photo preserves a May 2022 RopeFest show-program trace at Skorokhod and the official Peterburg site records XIII RopeFest on May 1-3 2026 in Saint Petersburg with a large main-stage, small-stage, workshop and fair program. This decade slice prevents contemporary Moscow, Saint Petersburg and regional Russian performers from visually collapsing into the 2010s founding festival entry.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Official site / news archive

- Two-day Moscow RopeFest with tickets for either day or both days
- RFMSK23 workshop / profile traces for Nick Freerider, Poryadnov, Zevsa and Victoria Evainropes
  - Linked evidence or record: [Nick Freerider](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/nick-freerider/); [Poryadnov](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/alexey-poryadnov/); [Zevsa](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/zevsa/); [Victoria Evainropes](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/evainropes/)

### Shibaricamp 2023

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2023/shibaricamp-2023/

Fact — 7–13 Aug · Bohuslan / Gothenburg area, Sweden 🇸🇪 · Past

Fact — Shibaricamp 2023 runs 7–13 Aug in Bohuslan / Gothenburg area, Sweden.

Fact — Recurring week-long summer camp on the west coast of Sweden focused on rope bondage, community, co-creation, classes, private tuition, rope play and small-group learning. Held in Bohuslan near Gothenburg / Smogen; the 2019 edition ran August 5-11 and listed a complete teacher team such as Sansblague & Bergborg, Lello Li & Alex Mino, Andrea Ropes & Chiara Fenice, MnR and Artifexual. The 2025 edition ran August 4-10 and listed Stuart, Luke & Kate, Rope and Yukiscream / Miya in its public teacher traces. The 2026 edition runs August 3-9 and the official teachers page names Annika, Isla & Luisa, Neya & Kameko, and Tiferet & Lily. Shibaricamp's own teacher archive also records a dense international 2010s / 2020s roster such as Anna Bones & Fred Hatt, Barkas & Addie, Sansblague & Bergborg, Ceci Ferox, Gestalta, Soptik, Tifereth, Joan von Brook, Petite Pretzel and Andrea Ropes.

- Zor & Margout Darko @camp 2023
  - Linked evidence or record: [Margout Darko](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/margout-darko/)

### UNBOUND Tokyo at or MIYASHITA PARK 2023

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2023/unbound-tokyo-2023/

Fact — 17 Sep · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · or MIYASHITA PARK · Past

Fact — UNBOUND Tokyo at or MIYASHITA PARK runs 17 Sep in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Recurring Tokyo shibari + music / performance-art event from the Hidden Layer orbit. Pablo Shibari's official bio says he and AIAIDA created Unbound with DJ SuperUser and Kojiro support after the launch party for Hidden Layer. PR Times frames the 2023 or MIYASHITA PARK edition as a Hidden Layer Studio / SuperUser event and says the first edition was held in 2021. Bonobo, Resident Advisor and WOMB listings show continued 2024-2025 editions combining shibari, philosophy, electronic music, visual art and performance, such as WOMB 2025 traces for Hajime Kinoko, Hidden Layer Show and LaoDai.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### PR Times event preview

- UNBOUND event at or MIYASHITA PARK with shibari, DJ / music, performance, video, makeup and fashion context
- Pablo & Ai Aida listed among performance artists

### Kinbaku Dreams 2024 Partici-party Theme Camp

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2024/kinbaku-dreams-participarty-2024/

Fact — 12–13 Apr · Jimna, Australia 🇦🇺 · Jungle Love / Partici-party · Past

Fact — Kinbaku Dreams 2024 Partici-party Theme Camp runs 12–13 Apr in Jimna, Australia.

Fact — Australian Kinbaku Dreams rope camp / performance-team and event umbrella hosted via Kinbaku Australia. The current official site frames Kinbaku Dreams around immersive gatherings, evocative performances and inclusive workshops, and the Humanitix collection characterizes it as a performance team coordinating rope-related events via the year. Public Jungle Love coverage places Kinbaku Dreams in the 2018 performance-art lineup beside a Shibari workshop, while Humanitix records the September 2022 Jungle Love theme camp as an expansion of an earlier popular workshop into performances, intro and beginner workshops, rope experiences and intermediate / advanced workshops. The 2024 Partici-party page records Kinbaku Dreams as a returning Jungle Love feature theme camp, and later Humanitix pages track the shift into capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreats and camps in 2025-2027.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published theme-camp format

- Feature theme camp at Jungle Love's Partici-party with a welcoming rope space
- Ties, demos, performances and shibari workshops, with 18+ kink-friendly after-dark space
- Dedicated theme-camp tent with practice rope, padded floor, suspension points and bamboo beams

### Alive Onawa Matsuri / Alive Kinbaku Festival 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/alive-kinbaku-festival-2025/

Fact — 5–7 Sep · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · Alive Kinbaku Dojo · Past

Fact — Alive Onawa Matsuri / Alive Kinbaku Festival runs 5–7 Sep in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — Prague rope festival organized via Alive Kinbaku Dojo and Alive Ropes. ShibariRigger.cz reports the first Alive Onawa Matsuri / Alive Kinbaku Festival as a three-day September 2025 AKD festival with workshops, discussions, performances and rope jams. The official AKD 2026 page announces the third Alive Kinbaku Festival for September 4-6, 2026 in Praha 7 / Holesovice, with workshop blocks, evening performances, discussion blocks, Alive Rope Jams, capacity around 40 participants plus teachers, and a provisional Czech / international teacher roster. The provisional 2026 roster is treated as programme evidence until the final programme is public.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Festival format

- Three-day first edition at Alive Kinbaku Dojo
  - Linked evidence or record: [Alive Kinbaku Dojo](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/dojos/alive-kinbaku-dojo/)
- 20 workshops / discussions across seven blocks
- 12 teachers, 3 evening performances and daily rope jams
- More than 50 hours of programme

### BalkanBound Fall 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/balkanbound-fall-2025/

Fact — 15–16 Nov · Belgrade, Serbia 🇷🇸 · SKC Baza · Past

Fact — BalkanBound Fall 2025 runs 15–16 Nov in Belgrade, Serbia.

Fact — Belgrade-centered international shibari festival presented as the first shibari festival in the Balkans. BalkanBound's public Telegram archive and Instagram profile frame the festival as established by Vlada Vedmovskaya in Spring 2025 and list NekoNeko Studio as an organizer / Belgrade shibari-studio partner. The Spring 2025 programme records March 20-24 FestiveWeek workshops and the March 23 KC Grad festival, with Sarca & Manul, Mikhail Karlson & Marina, RomKnots & NatNata, Ludvig Rigger & Frostslavee and Vlada Vedmovskaya & Ksenia in the public programme. The public Fall 2025 archive preserves the November 15-16 SKC Baza edition with a wider November 12-16 festival-week program at AdultLand and KinkyLab, plus workshops, rope jams, talks and performances by RopeMarks & Keira, Vlada Vedmovskaya & Katya, RomKnots / Ded Mazai & NatNata, Andrea Ropes & AngieZiv, Nikita Ropekit & LianaKnot, Karol Soulrope & Kwistis, Goldie Sunshine & Nina, WisDomme & NyxRope, CatsCradle / RopeRat / Feuertänzer, Jaeger & Orsa and others.

### Danish Shibari Festival 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/danish-shibari-festival-2025/

Fact — 14–17 Aug · Sonder Felding, Denmark 🇩🇰 · Past

Fact — Danish Shibari Festival runs 14–17 Aug in Sonder Felding, Denmark.

Fact — Annual Danish shibari festival hosted by MyShibari at its private rope venue in Sønder Felding / Central Jutland. MyShibari characterizes the venue as Denmark's largest shibari venue, with indoor and outdoor suspension spots, forest and lake tying areas, an 11m tower, international presenters, workshops, rope jams and camping. The 2025 listing names HenRigger & A-TypeSub, Neya & Kameko, Saara Rei & Swen Brandy, Kitty Rea & Rainbow, Roxu & Ena and Vik13 & Gala as presenters; the 2026 listing calls it the fourth Danish Shibari Festival and names documented presenters Joan von Brook, Kameko and Sam Jay / Zero-Gi among a broader roster.

Fact — EURIX XXVII runs 20–25 Oct in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — European Rigger & Model Exchange in its 2020s phase, continuing as Felix Ruckert's Berlin-centered exchange and research format for contemporary rope artists after the pandemic-era disruption. EURIX XXVII autumn 2025 records Sarca & Kat Schrodinger among the presenters. This decade slice keeps current presenters visually attached to the present era rather than the 2010s founding entry.

Fact — FOR YOUR PLEASURE: SHIBARI Photo Exhibition 2025 runs 18–30 Nov in Bangkok, Thailand.

Fact — Bangkok shibari photography exhibition by Forfun Bangkok Co., Ltd. At Bangkok Art and Culture Centre in November 2025. The official BACC event page frames the show as a shibari photo exhibition about rope as an art form and records the Bangkok Art and Culture Centre Curved Wall, 3rd Floor as the venue. Public public social traces connect the FYP / BACC context to Usagi Shibari rope work, Kathalyn Rojanakongtawin model credits and FilmNetflick photography context, while Lilythothealley's official About page adds a direct artist-work trace.

### Jyo-mon 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/jyo-mon-2025/

Fact — 11–13 Apr · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · Takadanobaba · Past

Fact — Jyo-mon runs 11–13 Apr in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Tokyo shibari performance event associated with Hajime Kinoko and Ichinawakai. A 2018 Tokyo Shibari Aid report characterizes Jyo-mon as a Shinjuku shibari night hosted by Hajime Kinoko, structured as both an Ichinawakai student showcase and a mature performance night with established masters such as Nawashi Kanna, Shishi-waka, Shinobu Fuwa and Maruku. Tokyo Love District's 2025 listing frames Jyo-mon as a three-day Takadanobaba rope-performance event with Grace / Harmony / Beauty themes and a roster naming Hajime Kinoko, ZIMA & Mafuyu, Jake & Laced, VESPER & Miho, KungFurious and Louis Kordex. Louis Kordexe's official 2026 event page confirms continuing Takadanobaba / Studio Kicolit continuity under Hajime Kinoko, documenting a Sunday May 24, 2026 performance pair with Kiyome inside a three-day edition.

Fact — Kinbaku Camp runs 29 May – 1 Jun in Hadsund, Denmark.

Fact — Danish shibari / kinbaku camp near Hadsund. The 2025 Ropejam international Kinbaku Camp listing records a four-day schedule at Ropejam / Fruerlundparken with workshops by Andrea Ropes and Ren Yagami plus show pairings around Hairoguma / SarahAdira and Andrea Ropes / Yagami. The 2026 Kinbaku Camp site frames the event as intensive shibari workshops and shows at Fruerlundparken, with beginner, intermediate and advanced tracks and teachers such as Scot & Namarie.

### Kinbaku Dreams 2025 Camp

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/kinbaku-dreams-2025/

Fact — 31 Oct – 2 Nov · Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia 🇦🇺 · Private location near Natural Bridge / Springbrook National Park · Past

Fact — Kinbaku Dreams 2025 Camp runs 31 Oct – 2 Nov in Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia.

Fact — Australian Kinbaku Dreams rope camp / performance-team and event umbrella hosted via Kinbaku Australia. The current official site frames Kinbaku Dreams around immersive gatherings, evocative performances and inclusive workshops, and the Humanitix collection characterizes it as a performance team coordinating rope-related events via the year. Public Jungle Love coverage places Kinbaku Dreams in the 2018 performance-art lineup beside a Shibari workshop, while Humanitix records the September 2022 Jungle Love theme camp as an expansion of an earlier popular workshop into performances, intro and beginner workshops, rope experiences and intermediate / advanced workshops. The 2024 Partici-party page records Kinbaku Dreams as a returning Jungle Love feature theme camp, and later Humanitix pages track the shift into capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreats and camps in 2025-2027.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published camp format

- Capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreat with three days and three nights
- Performances, intro / progressive beginner workshops, rope experiences and live music
- Intermediate / advanced pre-booked workshops and dedicated suspension points

### Pinse Camp 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/pinse-camp-denmark-2025/

Fact — 6–9 Jun · Sonder Felding, Denmark 🇩🇰 · MyShibari · Past

Fact — Pinse Camp runs 6–9 Jun in Sonder Felding, Denmark.

Fact — Recurring Danish rope / shibari camp hosted by MyShibari at its Central Jutland venue in Sønder Felding. MyShibari's official listings describe Pinse Camp as a multi-day camp with lower-intermediate and intermediate / advanced tracks, workshop days, free rope space, indoor / outdoor tying facilities, camping, full catering and international teachers. RopeMarks' 2024 report names Bo and Ewa of MyShibari as hosts, with RopeMarks / the Shady Lady teaching the intermediate-advanced group and Haag / Zu as co-teachers. The 2025 programme records a GanRaptor / Kiki_x lower-intermediate track, an A-Nicolas / Ssyrene intermediate-advanced track and a Friday GanRaptor / Kiki_x performance; the 2026 programme records Nikoleta / Šembi for lower-intermediate / intermediate, Tifereth / Joan von Brook for intermediate / advanced and a Friday Nikoleta / Šembi performance.

### ropeXchange - Sommer im Knast 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/ropexchange-sommer-im-knast-2025/

Fact — 13–15 Jun · Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 · PrideArt · Past

Fact — RopeXchange - Sommer im Knast runs 13–15 Jun in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — Berlin three-day shibari and rope-bondage community festival / workshop weekend. The event characterizes itself as centered around Shibari & Rope Bondage and other kinky topics, taking place four times a year in Berlin, with 30+ hours of workshops, skill labs, peer networking, play / rope jams and a queer-friendly, polynormal safer-space framework. The archived June 2025 "Summer in Jail" programme confirms the June 13-15 Berlin edition and records Dan, Frl. Frivol, Arto & Jessa and Tom Delirio spanning workshops, exchange formats, rope making and jam / show activity.

Fact — Multi-day Shibari Camp in Poland organized around workshops, performances, rope jams, photo shoots and a Shibari Ball. A 2025 post-event report by Petite Pretzel records teaching and live-show participation with Ania Polsky at Castle Miedzylesie for Tati Limati's Shibari Camp. The 2026 edition is presented as an annual gathering at Zamek Miedzylesie; its team bio credits Tati Limati with running Shibari Camps in Poland and Ukraine and records current map-covered presenters / organizers such as Klaudyna, Astra, Vik & Gala, Marta Skinnysticks and Marta Pagan.

Fact — 3–5 Oct · Curitiba, Brazil 🇧🇷 · Ópera de Arame / SFCO179 · Past

Fact — Shibari Experience Brazil runs 3–5 Oct in Curitiba, Brazil.

Fact — Curitiba / Brazil shibari performance, party and workshop event. Local 2025 coverage announced the first edition around Hajime Kinoko's Brazil visit, with October 3-4 staged programming at Ópera de Arame and October 5 workshops at SFCO179; the Friday stage coverage names Hajime Kinoko, Akira Nawa, Áspero, Phoenix and Rigger Maia, while Kinoko's public post-event traces preserve a Hajime Kinoko / Luiza Jesus do Prado performance context. The current official 2026 site frames a November 13-15 three-day edition organized around performance, electronic-music party with shibari performances, and workshop formats; later public Instagram / ticketing traces identify Marie Sauvage as the 2026 main attraction and Sunday workshop artist.

### Shibari Camp 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/shibaricamp-sweden-2025/

Fact — 4–10 Aug · Smogen, Sweden 🇸🇪 · Past

Fact — Shibari Camp runs 4–10 Aug in Smogen, Sweden.

Fact — Recurring week-long summer camp on the west coast of Sweden focused on rope bondage, community, co-creation, classes, private tuition, rope play and small-group learning. Held in Bohuslan near Gothenburg / Smogen; the 2019 edition ran August 5-11 and listed a complete teacher team such as Sansblague & Bergborg, Lello Li & Alex Mino, Andrea Ropes & Chiara Fenice, MnR and Artifexual. The 2025 edition ran August 4-10 and listed Stuart, Luke & Kate, Rope and Yukiscream / Miya in its public teacher traces. The 2026 edition runs August 3-9 and the official teachers page names Annika, Isla & Luisa, Neya & Kameko, and Tiferet & Lily. Shibaricamp's own teacher archive also records a dense international 2010s / 2020s roster such as Anna Bones & Fred Hatt, Barkas & Addie, Sansblague & Bergborg, Ceci Ferox, Gestalta, Soptik, Tifereth, Joan von Brook, Petite Pretzel and Andrea Ropes.

### SwissBound autumn edition 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/swissbound-autumn-2025/

Fact — 14–16 Nov · Bern, Switzerland 🇨🇭 · Cancelled

Fact — SwissBound autumn edition runs 14–16 Nov in Bern, Switzerland.

Fact — Swiss shibari festival launched in 2022 around the Bern / Kehrsatz scene. Kinbakuwiki characterizes Swissbound as a spring-and-autumn Swiss festival focused on workshops, performances and rope jams, and says the concept was developed and run by Atrim Namor and L|M. Harukumo's October 2022 post records the first Bern edition as a three-day Shibari fair with workshops and live performances. The current official Swissbound notice says the Autumn 2025 and Spring 2026 editions were cancelled because the planned venue was closing, while the team searches for a new location for future years.

### Thick Hitches Conference 2025

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2025/thick-hitches-conference-2025/

Fact — 23–25 May · Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 · Karada House · Past

Fact — Thick Hitches Conference runs 23–25 May in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — Rope conference hosted by Karada House and centered on fat-identifying people and bodies in rope. The 2025 Karada House page characterizes it as a three-day in-person Berlin rope conference with mostly Japanese-inspired rope bondage and facilitators Ceci Ferox, Ginger, Mouse and Queerbaku; the separate in-house programme records their workshop / session blocks spanning May 23-25. Karada's March 2026 update says Thick Hitches 2026 is going virtual on July 24-26, 2026. The current event page records Ceci Ferox, Ginger, Mouse, Queerbaku, Ms. Reemah and Hansu as facilitators and says the detailed programme is still to come.

Fact — Alive Kinbaku Festival runs 4–6 Sep in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — Prague rope festival organized via Alive Kinbaku Dojo and Alive Ropes. ShibariRigger.cz reports the first Alive Onawa Matsuri / Alive Kinbaku Festival as a three-day September 2025 AKD festival with workshops, discussions, performances and rope jams. The official AKD 2026 page announces the third Alive Kinbaku Festival for September 4-6, 2026 in Praha 7 / Holesovice, with workshop blocks, evening performances, discussion blocks, Alive Rope Jams, capacity around 40 participants plus teachers, and a provisional Czech / international teacher roster. The provisional 2026 roster is treated as programme evidence until the final programme is public.

The official exhibitors and performers page records Maestro BD / Davide La Greca as a performer and educator.

### Bogotá Shibari Week 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/bogota-shibari-week-2026/

Fact — 18–24 May · Bogotá, Colombia 🇨🇴 · Past

Fact — Bogotá Shibari Week runs 18–24 May in Bogotá, Colombia.

Fact — Bogotá shibari / BDSM event week organized by Shibari Night Bogotá and Berilio Art Shibari. The 2023 second edition ran March 14-19 with six days of workshops, performances, talks, photoshoot, Ropebunny / Petplay parade, bazaar, play party, bondage picnic and shibari varieté, with guests from Argentina and Colombian BDSM rope communities. The 2024 third-edition listings show the format continuing with rope jams, talks and international / national presenters. The fourth edition then ran May 18-24, 2026 under the theme `Conversaciones Silenciosas, Conexión, comunicación y activación con cuerdas`, naming Renée de Sans as principal guest together with Liebre de Azul, Charles Ilcoatl and local guests.

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/boundcon-munich-2026/

Fact — 5–7 Jun · Munich, Germany 🇩🇪 · Zenithalle · Past

Fact — BoundCon XXI runs 5–7 Jun in Munich, Germany.

Fact — Munich-centered international bondage and fetish convention, running since 2004 and organized by Minuit Event GmbH / the BoundCon team, with Claudia Linder (Minuit) listed as owner, CEO and exhibitor / artist lead. BoundCon XXI is scheduled for June 5-7, 2026 at Zenithalle and combines exhibitors, international artists, rope space, stage shows, workshops, custom photo shoots, meet-and-greets and a SubRosaDictum aftershow party. Current workshop, artist and main-stage listings include Vinciens, Matthias Grimme / Rope Cat, Steve Freeman, Marie Sauvage / Atypi, Shibaku, Jordi Lucena, Sarca / Winter, Ligatio / Lizanne, RopEmotion, Tengu Shibari Munich, Sakura Rope, UnkownRigger, Viking Shibari and Amabuki Shibari; public evidence keeps present-era partner and presenter connections separate from the pre-2020 Munich convention entry.

### Danish Shibari Festival 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/danish-shibari-festival-2026/

Fact — 13–16 Aug · Sonder Felding, Denmark 🇩🇰 · Scheduled

Fact — Danish Shibari Festival runs 13–16 Aug in Sonder Felding, Denmark.

Fact — Annual Danish shibari festival hosted by MyShibari at its private rope venue in Sønder Felding / Central Jutland. MyShibari characterizes the venue as Denmark's largest shibari venue, with indoor and outdoor suspension spots, forest and lake tying areas, an 11m tower, international presenters, workshops, rope jams and camping. The 2025 listing names HenRigger & A-TypeSub, Neya & Kameko, Saara Rei & Swen Brandy, Kitty Rea & Rainbow, Roxu & Ena and Vik13 & Gala as presenters; the 2026 listing calls it the fourth Danish Shibari Festival and names documented presenters Joan von Brook, Kameko and Sam Jay / Zero-Gi among a broader roster.

Fact — Southeast United reports rope bondage / shibari conference based at Deerfields Retreat in Horse Shoe, North Carolina, near Asheville. The first-party site frames Elevation Rope as a multi-night immersive rope education event in the Blue Ridge Mountains, with beginner-to-masterclass instruction, outdoor / lake retreat context, themed evenings, performances and play parties. The 2026 edition is advertised for July 16-21, with the main four-night conference July 17-21 and optional early arrival on July 16.

### International Shibari Film Festival 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/isff-brussels-2026/

Fact — 2 Jul · Brussels, Belgium 🇧🇪 · Cinema Aventure · Past

Fact — International Shibari Film Festival runs 2 Jul in Brussels, Belgium.

Fact — Belgian film festival dedicated to shibari via cinema. The official ISFF site characterizes it as the first cultural event in Europe dedicated to shibari via the medium of cinema, presenting shibari as an artistic language at the crossroads of film, performance and visual arts. The public 2026 site places the festival in Brussels at Cinema Aventure on July 2, 2026, says it serves as the opening night of Graines de Cordes III, and names Atelier Mae ASBL as the organizer.

### Jyo-mon 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/jyo-mon-2026/

Fact — 22–24 May · Tokyo, Japan 🇯🇵 · Takadanobaba / Studio Kicolit · Past

Fact — Jyo-mon runs 22–24 May in Tokyo, Japan.

Fact — Tokyo shibari performance event associated with Hajime Kinoko and Ichinawakai. A 2018 Tokyo Shibari Aid report characterizes Jyo-mon as a Shinjuku shibari night hosted by Hajime Kinoko, structured as both an Ichinawakai student showcase and a mature performance night with established masters such as Nawashi Kanna, Shishi-waka, Shinobu Fuwa and Maruku. Tokyo Love District's 2025 listing frames Jyo-mon as a three-day Takadanobaba rope-performance event with Grace / Harmony / Beauty themes and a roster naming Hajime Kinoko, ZIMA & Mafuyu, Jake & Laced, VESPER & Miho, KungFurious and Louis Kordex. Louis Kordexe's official 2026 event page confirms continuing Takadanobaba / Studio Kicolit continuity under Hajime Kinoko, documenting a Sunday May 24, 2026 performance pair with Kiyome inside a three-day edition.

#### Programme

### Kinbaku Dreams Retreat 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/kinbaku-dreams-retreat-2026/

Fact — 21–22 Nov · Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia 🇦🇺 · Private location near Natural Bridge / Springbrook National Park · Scheduled

Fact — Kinbaku Dreams Retreat runs 21–22 Nov in Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia.

Fact — Australian Kinbaku Dreams rope camp / performance-team and event umbrella hosted via Kinbaku Australia. The current official site frames Kinbaku Dreams around immersive gatherings, evocative performances and inclusive workshops, and the Humanitix collection characterizes it as a performance team coordinating rope-related events via the year. Public Jungle Love coverage places Kinbaku Dreams in the 2018 performance-art lineup beside a Shibari workshop, while Humanitix records the September 2022 Jungle Love theme camp as an expansion of an earlier popular workshop into performances, intro and beginner workshops, rope experiences and intermediate / advanced workshops. The 2024 Partici-party page records Kinbaku Dreams as a returning Jungle Love feature theme camp, and later Humanitix pages track the shift into capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreats and camps in 2025-2027.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published retreat format

- Two days and two nights of rope in nature, creekside camping and community practice
- Eight rope workshops plus community-led sessions and after-dark music / adventures
- Dedicated suspension points and natural rigging environments

### Kinky Breizh Ropecamp 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/kinky-breizh-ropecamp-2026/

Fact — 23–26 Jul · France 🇫🇷 · Between Rennes and Nantes · Scheduled

Fact — Kinky Breizh Ropecamp runs 23–26 Jul in France.

Fact — French / Brittany-region kinky rope camp organized by Association Le Manoir. The official 2026 page announces a July 23-26, 2026 edition between Nantes and Rennes, with 26 shibari spaces such as upgraded suspension points in forest / natural areas, a Japanese Torii performance area with sound and light, workshops around rope, BDSM and Sulky practices, mini-munches, an expanded BDSM play zone, camping / lodging options and on-site food booking. The same page says 38 workshops were offered in 2025, so the event is documented as a recurring camp rather than a one-off listing; the private exact address is intentionally not listed.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Camp format

- 26 shibari spaces, including upgraded suspension points in forest / natural areas plus the new Les Cimes 2 high-play area
- Japanese Torii performance area with sound and light
- Floating platform for rope on water / in a natural area
- 60 rope, BDSM, Sulky and other workshop slots
- Mini-munches and expanded BDSM play zone
- Private camping zones, lodging options and food booking
- Artisan zone listed by Le Manoir, including Pudibondage, Cosmic Stuffs, Le Monde de Yahvee, strict-o-sensu and Cuir de Vendee
  - Linked evidence or record: [Le Manoir](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/communities/le-manoir-bretagne/)
- Association context listed by Le Manoir includes Encorde une fois, Les Fleurs de Sade and The Diaper Dreamer as guest context
  - Linked evidence or record: [Le Manoir](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/communities/le-manoir-bretagne/)

  - Linked evidence or record: [ATASH49](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/communities/atash49/)
- Ecole des Cordes school welcomed at the event
  - Linked evidence or record: [Ecole des Cordes](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/dojos/ecole-des-cordes/)

### Knots N'Roots Costa Rica 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/knots-n-roots-costa-rica-2026/

Fact — 25–29 Nov · San José, Costa Rica 🇨🇷 · Scheduled

Fact — Knots N'Roots Costa Rica runs 25–29 Nov in San José, Costa Rica.

Fact — Costa Rica shibari / kinbaku festival shell operated via the KnR / @knotsnroots_latamcr account. A November 2024 post by the project names Team Knots n' Roots, frames the event as a festival with invited guests and international talent, and ties it to growing shibari culture in Costa Rica. Public 2026 materials advertise the second Costa Rica edition for November 25-29, 2026, with tickets on sale and presenter cards for Roxu & Ena, Gorgone and Volcano & Minibeast; venue and ticketing details remain incomplete.

Fact — 9–11 Oct · New York City, United reports 🇺🇸 · Loft39 · Scheduled

Fact — Men Roping Men 2026 runs 9–11 Oct in New York City, United reports.

Fact — Recurring US rope conference focused on education and community-building for men, masc-leaning non-binary, trans and gender-nonconforming people interested in rope bondage. The official 2026 site characterizes Men Roping Men as the third annual conference, hosted in New York City on October 9-11, 2026, with direct instruction, performances, skill sharing and play / connection time. Its mission statement frames MRM as a volunteer-run organization emphasizing safety, consent, respect, diversity, education, networking and community building.

### Obryady — Festival of Knots 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/obryady-festival-of-knots-2026/

Fact — 23–26 Jul · Saint Petersburg, Russia 🇷🇺 · Outdoor forest and lakeside campsite · Scheduled

Fact — Obryady — Festival of Knots 2026 runs 23–26 Jul in Saint Petersburg, Russia.

Fact — Four-day outdoor rope and body-practice festival announced for July 23–26, 2026 in the Saint Petersburg area. The programme combines camping, shared meals, lake and forest rope photography, a free-tying zone, somatic and related practices, fire and wax play, and evening shibari performances on a forest stage. Aleksandr Kazak's official site gives KNOT-FEST a dedicated event block and routes registration to the standalone festival page; the precise campsite and named performer lineup are not publicly listed.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published four-day programme

- 12:00 Arrival and open festival day
- Rope photography by the lake and in the water
- Evening fire show, wax play and shibari programme
- Forest rope photography and a rope web above the lake
- Tea ceremony, main show and Offering Gifts to the Rope Gods
- Free day with SUPs, campfire and swimming
- 12:30 Festival close and departure

Fact — Karlsruhe erotic BDSM and fetish fair staged by M&A Messemanagement. Official public pages support recurring 2024-2026 continuity and frame obscene as a community-oriented fair with exhibitors, workshops, stage shows, evening events and the bondage area Rope Xperience. The public 2026 programme names rope workshops and stage performances such as Ren Yagami, Aijō / Shana & Jack, RopuNawa, Sakura Rope, VAEGABOUND x Sapieha, Dan Apus Monoceros, Davide La Greca, Happa & LucyLaCat and Rope Xperience & Friends, making the fair a current regional rope-performance connection rather than only a shopping / fetish-market entry.

### Onawa Asobi Europe 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/onawa-asobi-europe-2026/

Fact — 26–27 Sep · Antwerp, Belgium 🇧🇪 · Shibari Lounge · Scheduled

Fact — Onawa Asobi Europe runs 26–27 Sep in Antwerp, Belgium.

Fact — European edition of the Tokyo-centered Onawa Asobi kinbaku festival, held at Shibari Lounge in Antwerp. The Tokyo festival has run yearly since 2009 under Yoi Yoshida and is described by Onawa Europe as a stepping stone for many Japanese shibarite, such as Naka Akira, Hajime Kinoko, Ranki Kazami, Ren Yagami, Kasumi Hourai, Shigonawa Bingo and Ero Ouji. Yoi Yoshida teamed with BeShibari / Marc BeShibari and Shibarista Jess to bring the format to Antwerp in 2020; later European editions followed in 2023, 2024, 2025 and 2026. The event frames itself as two days of amateur Japanese and European kinbaku performances, Shibari Night rope parties, friendship, cultural exchange and sincere rope interaction rather than a competition or masterclass convention.

### ParanFest Yerevan 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/paranfest-yerevan-2026/

Fact — 23–24 May · Yerevan, Armenia 🇦🇲 · Past

Fact — ParanFest Yerevan runs 23–24 May in Yerevan, Armenia.

Fact — Two-day 18+ shibari / Japanese-culture festival held in Yerevan, Armenia on May 23-24, 2026. The first-party site frames PARANFEST as the first Armenian festival of Japanese culture, voluntary bondage and rope bondage / shibari, with performances, educational lectures, workshops, a market zone and open discussions. The public Telegram channel, Instagram announcement and final schedule make it structurally useful for the map because the roster connects multiple existing Russian-language and European scene entries, such as Nick Freerider, Tati Limati, Zevsa, Aleksei Kalatsky, Nik Yourknots, Vasilisa Lesnaya, august, Entangled Witch and Aleksandra Bor / Trojm.

### Pinse Camp 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/pinse-camp-denmark-2026/

Fact — 22–25 May · Sonder Felding, Denmark 🇩🇰 · MyShibari · Past

Fact — Pinse Camp runs 22–25 May in Sonder Felding, Denmark.

Fact — Recurring Danish rope / shibari camp hosted by MyShibari at its Central Jutland venue in Sønder Felding. MyShibari's official listings describe Pinse Camp as a multi-day camp with lower-intermediate and intermediate / advanced tracks, workshop days, free rope space, indoor / outdoor tying facilities, camping, full catering and international teachers. RopeMarks' 2024 report names Bo and Ewa of MyShibari as hosts, with RopeMarks / the Shady Lady teaching the intermediate-advanced group and Haag / Zu as co-teachers. The 2025 programme records a GanRaptor / Kiki_x lower-intermediate track, an A-Nicolas / Ssyrene intermediate-advanced track and a Friday GanRaptor / Kiki_x performance; the 2026 programme records Nikoleta / Šembi for lower-intermediate / intermediate, Tifereth / Joan von Brook for intermediate / advanced and a Friday Nikoleta / Šembi performance.

### Queerope Berlin 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/queerope-berlin-2026/

Fact — 2–6 Sep · Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 · KARA / Karada House · Scheduled

Fact — Queerope Berlin runs 2–6 Sep in Berlin, Germany.

Fact — Karada House's queer rope conference for LGBTQIA+ people and womên, focused mostly on shibari, kinbaku and Japanese-inspired bondage. Queerope exists in both virtual and in-person Berlin formats: the February 11-16 2026 virtual edition published online workshops, performances, demonstrations and discussions, while Queerope Berlin 2026 is a five-day in-person conference at KARA / Karada House on September 2-6 with 37 facilitated spaces / workshops. Published 2026 line-ups include Caritia, Ceci Ferox, Mouse, Murasaki Haruan, Naoko, Renée de Sans and Sophia Rose among facilitators; the Berlin edition also records Juliette & Olive, Lief Bound, Icarus / Icky, Nana Quinn, Thumper and Bondagious. VoxBody's curriculum bio independently names Blue as having presented at Karada House's Queerope.

##### Conference format

- 5-day in-person conference
- 37 facilitated spaces / workshops
- Skillshares, lab or hangout spaces
- Multiple rooms, retreat areas, kitchen, bathrooms and garden
- LGBTQIA+ people and womên only
- Optional breakfast, lunch and all-day snacks
- Daily quick Covid tests

### QuIRKS 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/quirks-vancouver-2026/

Fact — 8–10 May · Vancouver, Canada 🇨🇦 · Studio Allegory · Past

Fact — QuIRKS runs 8–10 May in Vancouver, Canada.

Fact — QuIRKS, the Queer International Rope & Kink Symposium, was a three-day Studio Allegory event in Vancouver on May 8-10, 2026. Official pages describe Studio Allegory's first QuIRKS as an in-person weekend for queer kinksters with 12 workshops / classes, 3 play parties, an opening orientation, local and international queer presenters, and a resource hub with presenter, timetable and class details. The published programme creates a visible connection between Studio Allegory's Vancouver scene and existing Berlin / London / Chicago rope educators such as Mamana, Renée de Sans, Sophia Rose, Barkas and Anoxia / Nox.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Symposium format

- Three-day queer rope and kink symposium with 12 workshops/classes and 3 play parties
- Opening orientation is mandatory for participants; other sessions are voluntary

### Rope Spirit XX 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/rope-spirit-xx-2026/

Fact — 17 Jan · Prague, Czech Republic 🇨🇿 · PM Club · Past

Fact — Rope Spirit XX runs 17 Jan in Prague, Czech Republic.

Fact — Prague / Czech shibari performance event produced in the Hell Events orbit. Rope Spirit frames nights of Japanese bondage / shibari performances with a strict no-photo policy and post-show tying floor, and Sanctuary's 2026 listing characterizes the twentieth Rope Spirit as having grown from a small first meeting roughly eleven years earlier into a larger but still intimate show format. Archived performer and live gallery traces preserve continuity from the 2015 first editions via Rope Spirit XX in 2026, such as Frater & Manako at Rope Spirit VI and Nawasabi with Schwarzes Biest at Rope Spirit IX.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Programme / gallery traces

- PM Club Twentieth-edition Rope Spirit performance night in Prague
  - Linked evidence or record: [Rope Spirit](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/events/rope-spirit/)
- Sanctuary describes five shibari performances: three domestic pairs and two foreign pairs
- HellEvents gallery preserves 2026 traces for Kinbaku Shark, Denis Stolarik and Agience

### RopeFest Peterburg 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/ropefest-peterburg-2026/

Fact — 1–3 May · Saint Petersburg, Russia 🇷🇺 · Past

Fact — RopeFest Peterburg 2026 runs 1–3 May in Saint Petersburg, Russia.

Fact — 2020s slice of the RopeFest event family, now covering current Moscow / RFMSK23 traces, a 2022 Saint Petersburg / Skorokhod photo-archive trace and the revived RopeFest Peterburg 2026 branch. The official Moscow site frames the 2023 edition as an international shibari festival and records current Moscow-scene participants and teachers such as Nick Freerider, Zevsa and Poryadnov, while Kommersant Photo preserves a May 2022 RopeFest show-program trace at Skorokhod and the official Peterburg site records XIII RopeFest on May 1-3 2026 in Saint Petersburg with a large main-stage, small-stage, workshop and fair program. This decade slice prevents contemporary Moscow, Saint Petersburg and regional Russian performers from visually collapsing into the 2010s founding festival entry.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Festival format

- Master classes, seminars, fair, peer rope and evening shibari show
- Evening show runs 17:00-23:00

- Nick Freerider, CherryRopes, Se, Sofia Enn, Ivan Baronardi, Alexey Poryadnov, Arya Dark, Kazak, Master Set, Renata Fushime, Vasilisa Lesnaya, Drinking Fox, Stan Lee and Kano
  - Linked evidence or record: [Nick Freerider](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/nick-freerider/); [CherryRopes](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/cherryropes/); [Sofia Enn](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/sofia-enn/); [Ivan Baronardi](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/ivan-baronardi/); [Alexey Poryadnov](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/alexey-poryadnov/); [Arya Dark](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/arya-dark/); [Kazak](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/kazak/); [Master Set](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/master-set/); [Renata Fushime](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/renata-fushime/); [Vasilisa Lesnaya](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/vasilisa-lesnaya/); [Drinking Fox](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/drinking-fox/); [Stan Lee](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/stan-lee-rope/); [Kano](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/kano/)

### Shibari Camp by kokxxx_rope 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibari-camp-kokxxx-2026/

Fact — 3–6 Jul · Ludbreg, Croatia 🇭🇷 · Shibari camp, Rivalno · Past

Fact — Shibari Camp by kokxxx_rope runs 3–6 Jul in Ludbreg, Croatia.

Fact — Croatian shibari camp organized via Kokxxx rope. SM-ART Ljubljana's 2023 blog review characterizes the first edition as SHIBARI CAMP by kokxxx_rope & MyShibari, a three-day event near Zagreb. The 2026 CoreEvent listing characterizes the July 3-6 edition near Rivalno / Ludbreg as the fourth Shibari Camp by kokxxx_rope, combining workshops, performance, rope jams, music, community time, dungeon / play-party evenings, pool parties and all-inclusive camping. The public 2026 roster records Lexie Nawa as international guest, Ludvig on the advanced track, Angie Ziv for performance, and Teljes_Szakall & TarraXinha for the beginner track. Lexienawa, Ludvig and Angie Ziv are listed as map connections because they already have established map entries; Teljes_Szakall and TarraXinha remain roster-level until stronger independent sources or map connections appear.

### Shibari Camp Poland 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibari-camp-poland-2026/

Fact — 21–27 Jun · Miedzylesie, Poland 🇵🇱 · Zamek Miedzylesie · Past

Fact — Shibari Camp Poland runs 21–27 Jun in Miedzylesie, Poland.

Fact — Multi-day Shibari Camp in Poland organized around workshops, performances, rope jams, photo shoots and a Shibari Ball. A 2025 post-event report by Petite Pretzel records teaching and live-show participation with Ania Polsky at Castle Miedzylesie for Tati Limati's Shibari Camp. The 2026 edition is presented as an annual gathering at Zamek Miedzylesie; its team bio credits Tati Limati with running Shibari Camps in Poland and Ukraine and records current map-covered presenters / organizers such as Klaudyna, Astra, Vik & Gala, Marta Skinnysticks and Marta Pagan.

### Shibari Experience Brazil 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibari-experience-brazil-2026/

Fact — 13–15 Nov · Curitiba, Brazil 🇧🇷 · Ópera de Arame · Scheduled

Fact — Shibari Experience Brazil runs 13–15 Nov in Curitiba, Brazil.

Fact — Curitiba / Brazil shibari performance, party and workshop event. Local 2025 coverage announced the first edition around Hajime Kinoko's Brazil visit, with October 3-4 staged programming at Ópera de Arame and October 5 workshops at SFCO179; the Friday stage coverage names Hajime Kinoko, Akira Nawa, Áspero, Phoenix and Rigger Maia, while Kinoko's public post-event traces preserve a Hajime Kinoko / Luiza Jesus do Prado performance context. The current official 2026 site frames a November 13-15 three-day edition organized around performance, electronic-music party with shibari performances, and workshop formats; later public Instagram / ticketing traces identify Marie Sauvage as the 2026 main attraction and Sunday workshop artist.

### Shibari Valencia Fest 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibari-valencia-fest-2026/

Fact — 22–24 May · Valencia, Spain 🇪🇸 · Vaive Circ · Past

Fact — Shibari Valencia Fest runs 22–24 May in Valencia, Spain.

Fact — Valencia shibari festival organized via Reisei Studio. The first documented edition ran May 22-24, 2026 at Vaive Circ near Valencia, with simultaneous workshop tracks, performances and rope jams; the final public schedule gives the workshop grid and invited educator / performance-night pairs as Barkas & Addie, Supaku & Kel, and Soptik & Sansei. In June 2026, the official festival / Reisei channels announced a May 21-23, 2027 continuation and named Gorgone as the first confirmed presenter, with the model still to be confirmed.

### Shibari Camp 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibaricamp-sweden-2026/

Fact — 3–9 Aug · Smogen, Sweden 🇸🇪 · Scheduled

Fact — Shibari Camp runs 3–9 Aug in Smogen, Sweden.

Fact — Recurring week-long summer camp on the west coast of Sweden focused on rope bondage, community, co-creation, classes, private tuition, rope play and small-group learning. Held in Bohuslan near Gothenburg / Smogen; the 2019 edition ran August 5-11 and listed a complete teacher team such as Sansblague & Bergborg, Lello Li & Alex Mino, Andrea Ropes & Chiara Fenice, MnR and Artifexual. The 2025 edition ran August 4-10 and listed Stuart, Luke & Kate, Rope and Yukiscream / Miya in its public teacher traces. The 2026 edition runs August 3-9 and the official teachers page names Annika, Isla & Luisa, Neya & Kameko, and Tiferet & Lily. Shibaricamp's own teacher archive also records a dense international 2010s / 2020s roster such as Anna Bones & Fred Hatt, Barkas & Addie, Sansblague & Bergborg, Ceci Ferox, Gestalta, Soptik, Tifereth, Joan von Brook, Petite Pretzel and Andrea Ropes.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Teacher lineup

- Annika
- Isla & Luisa
- Neya & Kameko
  - Linked evidence or record: [Kameko](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/kameko/)
- Tiferet & Lily
##### Camp format

- Teacher-led classes in parallel rooms
- Private tuition
- Evening tie and play spaces
- Co-created classes, discussions or performances
- Shibaret community cabaret

### Shibaru Fest 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/shibaru-fest-moscow-2026/

Fact — 17–19 Jul · Moscow, Russia 🇷🇺 · Scheduled

Fact — Shibaru Fest 2026 runs 17–19 Jul in Moscow, Russia.

Fact — Moscow three-day Shibaru festival format scheduled for July 17-19, 2026. Public Telegram sources present SHIBARU FEST 2026 as a program of workshops, lectures, free tying, market, social space and performances. The direct public schedule gives day-by-day workshop and performance blocks, naming participants Nick Freerider, Master Set, Yakov Kinkknight, Nikita Ropekit, Arya Dark, Alex Hitch, Anastasia Afanasyeva, august, Aleksey Poryadnov, Zévsa and Sirin / Alkonost alongside Sergei Libido, Ged, Melkaya, Jane, Dariia, Anya Vzroslaya, Koritsa, Teddy Void, Artem Parshin, Lyubov, Jaeger, Orsa, Lianaknot, Askeladd, Eida, Elena Evilpeaches and Woolman.

Fact — 27–28 Jun · Pula, Croatia 🇭🇷 · Past

Fact — Summer Binds #1 feat. MyShibari runs 27–28 Jun in Pula, Croatia.

Fact — Istrian shibari workshop weekend organized via Shibari Croatia. The first public edition, Summer Binds #1 feat. MyShibari, is listed for June 27-28, 2026 in Pula and is documented as the first Summer Binds weekend, dedicated to shibari on the Istrian coast, with MyShibari joining as presenters for four deep-dive sessions over two days.

### Thick Hitches Conference 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/thick-hitches-conference-2026/

Fact — 24–26 Jul · Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 · Karada House / online · Scheduled · Online

Fact — Thick Hitches Conference runs 24–26 Jul in Berlin, Germany as a fully online event.

Fact — Rope conference hosted by Karada House and centered on fat-identifying people and bodies in rope. The 2025 Karada House page characterizes it as a three-day in-person Berlin rope conference with mostly Japanese-inspired rope bondage and facilitators Ceci Ferox, Ginger, Mouse and Queerbaku; the separate in-house programme records their workshop / session blocks spanning May 23-25. Karada's March 2026 update says Thick Hitches 2026 is going virtual on July 24-26, 2026. The current event page records Ceci Ferox, Ginger, Mouse, Queerbaku, Ms. Reemah and Hansu as facilitators and says the detailed programme is still to come.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Facilitators

- Germany / Finland Ceci Ferox
  - Linked evidence or record: [Ceci Ferox](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/ceci-ferox/)
- UK Ginger
  - Linked evidence or record: [Ginger](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/ginger-rope/)
- UK Mouse
  - Linked evidence or record: [Mouse](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/mouse-in-rope/)
- France Queerbaku
  - Linked evidence or record: [Queerbaku](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/queerbaku/)
- USA Ms. Reemah
- Finland Hansu
##### Conference format

- Approx. 15 facilitated spaces / workshops
- Skillshares
- Lab / hangout time
- Tickets available; detailed workshop programme still to come

### Tying in the Tropics 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/tying-in-the-tropics-2026/

Fact — 9–16 May · Negril, Jamaica 🇯🇲 · Hedonism II · Past

Fact — Tying in the Tropics runs 9–16 May in Negril, Jamaica.

Fact — Seven-day shibari camp / kinky rope event at Hedonism II in Negril, Jamaica, May 9-16 2026, organized in the NYC Shibari orbit. The first-party page frames it as a week of sun, surf, shibari, play parties, beach rope and 36 hours of intensive education from international presenters such as Gorgone, Tifereth, RopuNawa, Sam Jay & Zero-Gi, Knot_head & Bodacious_Minx, plus event-specific model / partner participants.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Event format

- Seven-day all-inclusive shibari camp / kinky rope event at Hedonism II with intensive rope education, beach rope, play parties and presenter sessions.

### Zagreb in Ropes 2026

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2026/zagreb-in-ropes-2026/

Fact — 20–22 Feb · Zagreb, Croatia 🇭🇷 · Sparta Gym / Studio Katran · Past

Fact — Zagreb in Ropes runs 20–22 Feb in Zagreb, Croatia.

Fact — Croatian shibari festival hosted by Knot Noir. The 2026 CoreEvent listing characterizes Zagreb in Ropes as the first festival in Croatia fully dedicated to shibari, held over three days and two locations in Zagreb, with local and international rope artists, educators, performers, hands-on workshops, performances, rope-focused art, lectures, a market, exhibition and artistic installation.

### Kinbaku Dreams 2027

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2027/kinbaku-dreams-2027/

Fact — 19–22 Mar · Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia 🇦🇺 · Private location near Natural Bridge / Springbrook National Park · Scheduled

Fact — Kinbaku Dreams runs 19–22 Mar in Natural Bridge / Springbrook, Australia.

Fact — Australian Kinbaku Dreams rope camp / performance-team and event umbrella hosted via Kinbaku Australia. The current official site frames Kinbaku Dreams around immersive gatherings, evocative performances and inclusive workshops, and the Humanitix collection characterizes it as a performance team coordinating rope-related events via the year. Public Jungle Love coverage places Kinbaku Dreams in the 2018 performance-art lineup beside a Shibari workshop, while Humanitix records the September 2022 Jungle Love theme camp as an expansion of an earlier popular workshop into performances, intro and beginner workshops, rope experiences and intermediate / advanced workshops. The 2024 Partici-party page records Kinbaku Dreams as a returning Jungle Love feature theme camp, and later Humanitix pages track the shift into capped Natural Bridge / Springbrook rope retreats and camps in 2025-2027.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published camp format

- Three days and three nights of rope, performances, music and nature activities
- Two intro shibari workshops and two progressive beginner workshops
- Optional intermediate / advanced workshops, master classes and supervised rope experiences
- Eighteen dedicated suspension points plus natural rigging points

### Shibari FEST Kazakhstan 2027

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2027/shibari-fest-kz-2027/

Fact — 1–9 May · Almaty, Kazakhstan 🇰🇿 · Scheduled

Fact — Shibari FEST Kazakhstan runs 1–9 May in Almaty, Kazakhstan.

Fact — International Kazakhstan shibari festival in Almaty. Public Shibari FEST profile characterizes the event as a Kazakhstan shibari festival in Almaty, while 2024 posts say the festival was prepared by TEMA.Space and Studio Shi and list Enot as an Almaty / Moscow master. A July 2026 Telegram announcement confirms a May 1-9, 2027 edition with a shibari camp and performance-day format, with the detailed programme and participant list still pending. TEMA.Space and ShibariTutorial public posts also support Enot's organizer / performer role and the festival's function as a current Russian-language / Kazakhstan scene connection.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### Published 2027 format

- Shibari camp with workshops, practice and activities in a large country house
- Performance day in Almaty

### Shibari Valencia Fest 2027

Source URL: https://shibariatlas.org/events/2027/shibari-valencia-fest-2027/

Fact — 21–23 May · Valencia, Spain 🇪🇸 · Scheduled

Fact — Shibari Valencia Fest runs 21–23 May in Valencia, Spain.

Fact — Valencia shibari festival organized via Reisei Studio. The first documented edition ran May 22-24, 2026 at Vaive Circ near Valencia, with simultaneous workshop tracks, performances and rope jams; the final public schedule gives the workshop grid and invited educator / performance-night pairs as Barkas & Addie, Supaku & Kel, and Soptik & Sansei. In June 2026, the official festival / Reisei channels announced a May 21-23, 2027 continuation and named Gorgone as the first confirmed presenter, with the model still to be confirmed.

#### Line-up

#### Programme

##### First confirmed presenter

- [Gorgone](https://shibariatlas.org/lineage/people/gorgone/)
